---
title: "The Rev. Peter Young"
---

## The Rev. Peter Young

**Dates:** (Agra 1817-1902)

### Description

curate of Hursley

### Biography

He served as curate of Hursley from 1841, but Bishop Sumner refused to ordain him, so he moved away in 1861 to become Rector of North Witham, Lincolnshire.  He married (20 Oct 1839) Mrs Keble’s ward and cousin Caroline Coxwell.  

### Letters

- Letter from Good Friday [30 March], 1866
- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]
- Letter from June 13th 1857
- Letter from [21 March 1857]
- Letter from February 23, 1853
- Letter from [<i>c</i>. 21 October 1839]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
